node.statement: SUBROUTINE 2B — Interpolation Operator Block Encoding: Construct a (2^{d/2}, O(dL), 0)-block encoding of the d-dimensional interpolation operator (I^d_{l->l+1}) transpose using Lemma 14 row/column oracles P,Q. Each oracle uses O(L) gates and O(L) ancillas. The 1D oracle P (Lemma 15) prepares superpositions of sqrt(1/4), sqrt(1/2), sqrt(1/4) amplitudes. The 1D oracle Q (Lemma 16) handles row structure including boundary rows.
